{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Overlord-level madra
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The spiritual space inside [[Mercy]]'s book contains [[Overlord-level madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
